fields.label: Secret API Key
fields.helpText: From Knock dashboard -> Developers -> API Keys -> Secret key

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API key via Knock users list endpoint

metadata.summary: Knock notification infrastructure for orchestrating cross-channel notifications with preferences and workflows.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Sign up at dashboard.knock.app.
2. Go to Developers -> API Keys.
3. Copy the secret API key (starts with sk_).
4. Paste it here.
